creator: assembleer1@gmail.com
text:
The url https://download.freebsd.org/ftp/releases/ISO-IMAGES/12.1/ is as specific as can be.

On the https://freebsd.org main page I click on get freebsd. On that page thereis a download link that leads to the above url.

However currently it us working. Strange, as I did try this on 2 devices, 3 different browsers that gave all the same problem.

However my problem seems to be solved.

Thank you sincerely for your response and help offered.
Apologies for any inconvenience this might has caused.
